description: DB-backed integration: migrated-schema search returns chats matched by title and by message body, deduplicates to one row per chat, preserves latest `preview_text`, and orders results by relevance then recency.
DB-backed guard integration: search excludes another user's matching chat and returns no rows for a non-matching query.
Unit: the history sidebar keeps showing recent chats for an empty query and switches to debounced search results once the query reaches 2 characters.
Unit: a 1-character query shows the query-too-short helper without calling search, and clearing the query restores the recent-chat dataset.
Unit: search-mode no-results renders correctly and clicking a matching search result loads the persisted chat through `getChatMessagesAction`.
Unit: rename and delete actions rerun the active search query and keep the sidebar in search mode after the mutation completes.
Unit: `searchCurrentUserChatsAction` fails closed when chat persistence is unavailable or when the search columns are missing during rollout.
